Deletes every memory whose expires_at is in the past for the given
profile via the cleanup_expired_memories(target_profile) RPC.

Run with --dry-run to count first without deleting. Mirrors Python's
'ogham cleanup' command with the same confirmation-on-stdin safety gate.

Usage:
  ogham cleanup [flags]

Flags:
      --dry-run          Count expired memories without deleting
  -h, --help             help for cleanup
      --profile string   Profile to clean (defaults to active)
  -y, --yes              Skip confirmation prompt

Global Flags:
      --legacy          Route through the Python MCP sidecar instead of native Go
      --python          Alias for --legacy
  -q, --quiet           Suppress stderr informational notices (sidecar fallback message)
      --text            Human-readable output (default is JSON for LLM / script consumption)
  -v, --verbose count   Increase stderr log verbosity (-v = info, -vv = debug)
